pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version property from 1.8 to 11 to align with the target JDK.
Upgrade Spring Boot from 1.2.5.RELEASE to 2.3.7.RELEASE to support Java 11 and modernize the framework stack.
Change the Maven packaging from war to jar to align with modern Spring Boot executable jar conventions.
Update the Maven groupId to reflect the new project identity.
Update the Maven artifactId to reflect the new project identity.
Upgrade Hibernate from 4.3.6.Final to 5.4.25.Final to match Spring Boot 2.x dependencies.
Upgrade Liquibase from 3.3.2 to 4.2.2 to ensure compatibility with newer database drivers and Java 11.
Explicitly define JAXB runtime version as it was removed from the JDK in Java 11.
Upgrade MapStruct from 1.0.0.CR1 to 1.4.1.Final for better Java 11 support and bug fixes.
Upgrade Maven Compiler Plugin to 3.8.1 to ensure proper compilation with Java 11.
Upgrade Maven Surefire Plugin to 3.0.0-M5 to support Java 11 test execution.
Upgrade Maven Failsafe Plugin to 3.0.0-M5 to support Java 11 integration test execution.
Upgrade Maven Enforcer Plugin to 3.0.0-M3 for modern rule enforcement.
Upgrade Maven Resources Plugin to 3.2.0 for better resource filtering support.
Upgrade Maven Javadoc Plugin to 3.2.0 to support Java 11 documentation generation.
Upgrade Maven War Plugin to 3.3.1 for modern war packaging standards.
Upgrade Maven Clean Plugin to 3.1.0 for modern cleanup operations.
Upgrade Checkstyle to 8.38 and Maven Checkstyle Plugin to 3.1.1 for modern code style enforcement.
Define Node.js version property for frontend build consistency.
Define NPM version property for frontend build consistency.
Introduce JHipster dependencies BOM to manage transitive dependency versions.
Add ArchUnit dependency for architectural unit testing.
Update Validation API to 2.0.1.Final to align with Jakarta EE / Java 11 standards.
Update Maven POM XSD schema location to HTTPS.
Add argLine property for JVM arguments during testing.
Add M2E APT activation property for Eclipse integration.
Add empty profile properties for no-liquibase, api-docs, and tls profiles.
Add empty repositories section with JHipster needle for future customization.
Add empty pluginRepositories section with JHipster needle for future customization.
Add comment placeholder for distribution management configuration.
Update the project name to reflect the new application identity.
Update Maven version property to 3.3.9.
Explicitly set project build source encoding to UTF-8.
Explicitly set project reporting output encoding to UTF-8.
Update test result directory property to use standard Maven build directory.
Update Maven build timestamp format property.
Remove legacy SonarQube properties that are no longer needed or managed differently.
Remove Maven prerequisites section as it is no longer required.
Remove old dependency version properties that are now managed by Spring Boot or JHipster BOM.
Remove old plugin version properties that are now managed by Spring Boot or JHipster BOM.
Remove explicit Spring Security version as it is now managed by Spring Boot.
Remove Springfox version as it is likely replaced or managed differently.
Remove Joda Time Hibernate integration as it is likely replaced by Java 8 Time API.
Remove usertype-core dependency as it is likely replaced by Hibernate 5 native support.
Remove metrics-spark-reporter as it is likely replaced by Micrometer.
Remove metrics-spring as it is likely replaced by Micrometer.
Remove json-path version as it is now managed by Spring Boot.
Remove commons-io version as it is now managed by Spring Boot.
Remove commons-lang version as it is now managed by Spring Boot.
Remove Gatling version as it is likely managed differently or removed.
Remove Gatling Maven Plugin version as it is likely managed differently or removed.
Remove javax.inject version as it is now part of the JDK or managed by Spring Boot.
Remove liquibase-slf4j version as it is now managed by Spring Boot.
Remove liquibase-hibernate4 version as it is replaced by liquibase-hibernate5.
Add liquibase-hibernate5 version to support Hibernate 5.
Add Javassist version to align with Hibernate 5 requirements.
Change file permissions from executable to regular file.

.editorconfig.general_idea: Reorganized .editorconfig to apply specific indentation rules to frontend and config file types instead of a global default.
.editorconfig.human_impl: Moved indent_style/size into [*.{ts,tsx,js,jsx,json,css,scss,yml,html}] block with indent_size = 2

.gitattributes.general_idea: Replace the minimal .gitattributes configuration with a comprehensive, community-standard template to handle line endings and binary detection for a wider variety of file types.
.gitattributes.human_impl: Replaced `* text eol=lf` and specific extensions with `* text=auto` and extensive lists for text, binary, documents, and config files.

.gitignore.general_idea: Ignore the generated main CSS file to prevent committing build artifacts.
Ignore static resources copied to the target classes directory.
Ignore Node.js temporary directories and debug logs.
Ignore Webpack and loader cache directories.
Ignore Spring Tool Suite 4 cache directory.
Ignore IntelliJ IDEA compiled output directories.
Ignore Visual Studio Code configuration directory.
Ensure Maven Wrapper JAR is not ignored (un-ignore).
Standardize gitignore patterns by removing redundant trailing slashes and wildcards.

.yo-rc.json.general_idea: Update the JHipster generator version to 7.0.0-beta.0 to align with the Java 11 migration target.
Remove the explicit javaVersion configuration as JHipster 7 defaults to Java 11 and no longer requires this field for standard setups.
Rename the application base name to reflect the new sample application identity.
Update the Java package name to match the new application identity.
Convert string-based boolean configuration values to actual booleans for consistency with newer JHipster versions.
Add default configuration fields required by the newer JHipster generator version.

package.json.general_idea: Replace Grunt-based build system with Angular CLI and Webpack for modern frontend compilation.
package.json.human_impl: Removed 'grunt' and related plugins; added '@angular-builders/custom-webpack' and 'ng' scripts.

package.json.general_idea: Upgrade frontend framework from legacy AngularJS (1.x) to modern Angular (11.x).
Switch frontend unit testing from Karma/Jasmine to Jest for better performance and integration.
Update end-to-end testing from Protractor with PhantomJS to Protractor with modern drivers.
Replace Bootstrap 3 and legacy UI components with Bootstrap 4 and ng-bootstrap.
Integrate ngx-translate for internationalization support in the Angular application.
Replace moment.js or native date handling with dayjs for lighter weight date manipulation.
Add ngx-webstorage for typed access to browser local/session storage.
Enable infinite scroll functionality for lists using ngx-infinite-scroll.
Integrate FontAwesome icons via Angular-specific wrapper.
Include Swagger UI distribution for rendering API documentation in the frontend.
Modernize code linting and formatting with ESLint and Prettier.
Add npm scripts to manage Docker containers for database and Keycloak during development/CI.
Define comprehensive CI/CD scripts for backend testing, frontend building, and E2E execution.
Update package name, version, and description to reflect the new OAuth2 sample application.

src/main/resources/.h2.server.properties.general_idea: Rename the embedded H2 database identifier to match the specific application name.
src/main/resources/.h2.server.properties.human_impl: Changed 'JHipster H2 (Embedded)' and jdbc url to 'JHipster H2 (Memory)' and 'jhipsteroauth2sampleapplication'

src/main/resources/.h2.server.properties.general_idea: Allow remote access to the H2 web console by setting webAllowOthers to true.

src/main/resources/banner.txt.general_idea: Replace the old ASCII art banner with the standard JHipster Spring Boot banner including ANSI color codes.
src/main/resources/banner.txt.human_impl: Replaced custom ASCII art with JHipster's standard block-based banner using ${AnsiColor.GREEN} and ${AnsiColor.RED} variables.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Introduce JHipster-specific configuration properties for cache, CORS, mail, and logging to align with the framework's standard structure.
Switch from generic DataSourceClassName to HikariCP specific configuration and update H2 database URL and credentials.
Update the JPA database platform property to use the new JHipster-specific FixedH2Dialect class.
Add Spring Boot DevTools configuration for restart and livereload settings.
Define explicit logging levels for root, JHipster, Hibernate, and the application package.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.human_impl:
logging:
  level:
    ROOT: DEBUG
    tech.jhipster: DEBUG

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Include the api-docs profile in the active profiles list to enable API documentation generation.
Update Liquibase contexts to include 'faker' for loading sample data during development.
Add Spring Mail configuration properties for host, port, and credentials.
Change message cache duration from seconds to ISO 8601 duration format.
Enable indented output for Jackson JSON serialization.
Explicitly disable the H2 console in the dev profile configuration.
Configure Thymeleaf to disable caching in the dev profile.
Configure CORS settings to allow all origins, methods, and headers for development convenience.
Add configuration for forwarding logs to Logstash, disabled by default.
Add configuration to control whether logs are formatted as JSON.
Add a specific JHipster mail property for the base URL used in email templates.
Add a placeholder section for application-specific properties.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Switched from legacy MySQL JDBC driver to HikariCP connection pool for better performance and compatibility with modern Spring Boot.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Changed spring.datasource.type to com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource and removed dataSourceClassName.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Updated Hibernate dialect to support newer MySQL versions and removed deprecated naming strategy.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Removed explicit database-platform and naming-strategy, relying on auto-detection or newer defaults.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Replaced deprecated EhCache 2.x region factory with standard Spring Cache abstraction compatible with JDK 11.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Removed hibernate.cache.region.factory_class and moved cache config to jhipster.cache.ehcache.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Replaced legacy Dropwizard metrics with Micrometer for Spring Boot 2.x compatibility.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Removed metrics.spark/graphite blocks and added management.metrics.export.prometheus.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Removed explicit XHTML mode setting as it is no longer required or recommended in newer Thymeleaf versions.
Added explicit logging levels for JHipster and application packages to ensure consistent log output in production.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Added logging.level.ROOT, tech.jhipster, and io.github.jhipster.sample entries.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Enabled HTTP response compression to improve performance for text-based content types.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Added server.compression.enabled: true with specific mime-types.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Configured graceful shutdown to allow in-flight requests to complete during server stop.
Explicitly disabled Spring Boot DevTools features in production profile to prevent accidental activation.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Added spring.devtools.restart.enabled: false and livereload.enabled: false.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Added explicit mail server configuration placeholders for production environment setup.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Added spring.mail.host, port, username, and password fields.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Moved JHipster-specific configuration into the dedicated jhipster namespace for type-safe configuration support.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Moved http.cache, cache.ehcache, and mail.base-url into jhipster: block.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Updated Liquibase configuration to use the new spring.liquibase.contexts property format.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Changed liquibase.context: prod to spring.liquibase.contexts: prod.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Updated JDBC URL to include necessary parameters for modern MySQL drivers and timezone handling.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Added useSSL=false, useLegacyDatetimeCode=false, serverTimezone=UTC to JDBC URL.

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Boot 1.x actuator properties with Spring Boot 2.x management endpoint configuration.
Update async task configuration to use Spring Boot 2.x `spring.task` namespace instead of custom `async` properties.
Move mail configuration from custom `mail` namespace to standard Spring Boot `spring.mail` properties.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.human_impl: Replaced `mail.host` with `spring.mail.host` (implied by structure change, though specific values moved to profile-specific files in typical JHipster, here the structure is updated).

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Replace legacy JHipster security properties with Spring Security 5.x OAuth2 client configuration.
Update Swagger documentation properties to align with newer SpringFox/Swagger versions used in JHipster 6.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.human_impl: Replaced `swagger.title` with `jhipster.api-docs.title` and updated field names like `termsOfServiceUrl` to `terms-of-service-url`.

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add standard Spring Data JPA and Hibernate configuration properties required for Spring Boot 2.x compatibility.
Configure Micrometer metrics export and health probes for Spring Boot 2.x actuator.
Add server servlet session cookie configuration for security hardening.
